keywords: do u guys have esim plans
what types of esim do you have
what esim plans do you offer
intents.conflict_note: Takes priority over mobile_intro when 'esim' keyword is present
intents.response:
📲 Yes, we offer eSIMs!

An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM built into your phone — no physical card needed.

✨ Benefits of eSIM:
   • Instant activation via QR code — no waiting for post
   • No physical card to lose or damage
   • Perfect for dual SIM setups
   • Eco-friendly (no plastic)
   • Available on all our EE mobile plans

Quick check: Does your phone support eSIM?
📱 Most iPhones from XS onwards support eSIM
📱 Many newer Android devices do too

🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/
suggestions: How do I check if my phone supports eSIM
What's the difference between eSIM and pSIM

intents.response:
📱 eSIM vs pSIM — What's the Difference?

🔲 Traditional SIM (pSIM):
   • Physical card you insert into your phone
   • Posted to you within 1–3 working days
   • Works on all compatible phones
   • Tactile — you can hold it!

📲 eSIM (Digital SIM):
   • Built into your phone — no card needed
   • Activated instantly via QR code
   • Requires an eSIM-compatible device
   • Perfect for dual SIM setups
   • Eco-friendly

✅ Both options are available on all our EE plans at no extra cost.

🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

🔍 How to Check if Your Phone Supports eSIM:

📱 For iPhone:
Go to Settings → Mobile Data → Add Data Plan
If you see this option, you're good to go!

🤖 For Android:
Go to Settings → Connections → SIM card manager → Add mobile plan
If this option appears, your device supports eSIM.

Not sure? Tell me your phone model and I'll let you know!

Most iPhones from XS (2018) onwards support eSIM. Many Samsung Galaxy, Google Pixel, and other recent Android devices do too.
suggestions: My phone supports eSIM – show plans
I need a physical SIM instead

intents.response:
💡 What is an eSIM?

An eSIM (Embedded SIM) is a digital SIM card that's built directly into your phone — there's no physical card to insert.

Instead of a plastic SIM, you simply:
1️⃣ Order your plan online
2️⃣ Receive a QR code by email within minutes
3️⃣ Scan the QR code with your phone
4️⃣ Done — you're connected!

✨ Benefits:
   • Instant activation
   • No physical card to lose or damage
   • Dual SIM capability on compatible phones
   • Eco-friendly

🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

📲 eSIM Plans — All Our EE Mobile Bundles Support eSIM!

Here's a quick overview:

📦 Z-Unlimited — Unlimited @ £29/mo (24-month)

Once you order, you'll receive a QR code by email within minutes — scan it and you're instantly connected!

🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

📮 Traditional SIM (pSIM)

A physical SIM card delivered free to your door within 1–3 working days.

How much mobile data do you typically use each month?

🌱 Light user (10–20GB) — browsing, messaging, occasional videos
🌿 Moderate user (50–100GB) — regular streaming, social media
🌳 Heavy user (150GB+) — lots of video, gaming, hotspot usage
❓ I'm not sure

keywords: how much data do i need
intents.response:
No worries! Let me help you work it out. Think about your typical daily usage:

• Do you watch Netflix/YouTube on your phone regularly?
• Do you use your phone as a hotspot for your laptop?
• Do you download large files or games?
• Or mostly just browse social media and message?

Answering yes to the first two or three = you're a heavy user (go for 100GB+).
Mostly social media + messaging = light user (10–20GB is fine).
Somewhere in between = moderate (50GB works well).

🌱 Light User Recommendations

Based on light usage, I'd recommend:

📦 Z-Essentials — 10GB
   From £9.50/mo (24-month) 🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

📦 Z-Comfort — 20GB
   From £11.00/mo (24-month) 🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

Both include unlimited UK calls & texts, EU roaming, 5G, free SIM & delivery.

keywords: can i keep my existing mobile number
intents.response:
📲 Keeping Your Existing Number

Yes! Number porting is completely free and straightforward.

You'll need your PAC (Porting Authorisation Code) from your current provider. You can request your PAC by texting PAC to 65075 on your current network.

Once you have it, share it with us and we'll handle the rest!

✅ Unlimited Data Options

Yes! We offer:

📦 Z-Unlimited — Truly unlimited mobile data
   From £29.00/mo (24-month)

📦 ZB-Unlimited — Unlimited mobile broadband
   From £15.00/mo (24-month)

Both run on the EE network with 5G speeds.

🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/
